data.body:
GAP_ANALYSIS_AMENDMENT: Three findings applied.

AC10: REPLAN_ESCALATE consumption specified
6d2e-ffee must explicitly document: if a previous implementation-plan invocation returned REPLAN_ESCALATE for a specific SC, the sprint Phase 7 gap classifier must override any implementation_gap classification to intent_gap (sprint consumes, not emits, REPLAN_ESCALATE).
Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_ESCALATE' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/gap-classification.md && grep -B5 -A10 'REPLAN_ESCALATE' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q 'intent_gap' && echo PASS

AC11: Input extraction from completion-verifier output is specified
6d2e-ffee must document how Phase 7 extracts the SC criterion text and failure explanation from the Phase 6 completion-verifier output to pass to the gap-classification sub-agent.
Verify: grep -A15 'Gap Classification' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q 'criterion\|SC text\|failure explanation\|completion-verifier' && echo PASS

AC12: Failure fallback behavior implemented (not just documented in contract)
On sub-agent dispatch failure, timeout, or unparseable output: treat all failing SC as intent_gap with ROUTING: brainstorm. No SC may be silently dropped. Log warning when fallback applies.
Verify: grep -A20 'Gap Classification' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q 'intent_gap\|fallback\|failure.*classif' && echo PASS

Source: Gap analysis findings 2, 3, and 4
